name: Dext
description: Receipt capture and expense processing software that turns messy paperwork into structured bookkeeping inputs for faster closes and cleaner records.
whyUseIt: Dext reduces the admin drag of receipt chasing, transaction coding, and supplier paperwork. It is especially helpful when the founder wants finance hygiene without becoming the finance assistant.
aiCapabilities: Dext uses OCR and machine learning to extract receipt fields, code transactions, match paperwork to ledger entries, and flag missing supporting documents.
